About ZEN

Zagreb's first
executive nest

ZEN — the ZSEM Executive Nest — fills a genuine gap in Zagreb's market. With nearly 10,000 applications for public dormitories and 3,200+ students left without a place, we built something better: a professionally managed, community-driven residence built specifically for international and out-of-Zagreb students.

01
Security
24/7 reception, smart access control, and a safe, well-lit neighbourhood.
02
Simplicity
Three-step online booking in English. All-inclusive pricing. No surprises.
03
Community
A structured programme that turns strangers into a network within days.
Premium Single
Designed for focus
Accommodation

Three rooms.
One standard
of quality.

Every price is all-inclusive: rent, electricity, water, heating, Wi-Fi, and full shared-facility access. No hidden charges.

Free LaundryGym AccessStudy AreasSocial Events24/7 SecurityBike Storage

Beyond Your Room

The whole building
is yours.

A great room is the beginning, not the destination. ZEN extends across multiple thoughtfully designed shared spaces — built for study, for stillness, and for the conversations that define a year abroad.

01 · Community
Social Lounge
The heart of the building — sofas, soft lighting, and the kind of space where Friday nights start.
02 · Productivity
Co-Working Studio
Quiet workstations with monitors, ergonomic seating, and extended exam-period hours.
03 · Skyline
Rooftop Terrace
A view of Zagreb's spires, string lights, and the season's best aperitivo hour.
Amenities & Services

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

01
24/7 Reception & Security
English-speaking staff on site around the clock. Smart access control throughout.
02
Study & Co-Working
Quiet zones with desk stations, natural lighting, and power. Extended during exams.
03
Gym & Fitness
Fully equipped — cardio, free weights, and functional training space.
04
Social Lounge
Flexible multi-purpose space for ZEN events and daily community life.
05
Free Laundry
Self-service laundry included in your monthly fee. No per-use charges, ever.
06
Bicycle Storage
Secure indoor parking supporting Zagreb's excellent cycling infrastructure.
07
Rooftop Terrace
Green area and terrace — especially valued during spring semester.
08
Maintenance SLA
Urgent: 4 hours. Standard: 48 hours. Always confirmed in writing.

ZEN Community Programme

You'll know 20 people
before your first lecture.

The ZEN Community Programme is our single most important differentiator — a full year of structured social, wellness, and academic events.

"ZEN In — on the first evening of every new semester, every new resident knows the building, the staff, and at least five neighbours."

Semester Start
ZEN In
Move-in welcome party on day one. The most important evening of your semester.
Monthly
ZEN Chef
International cooking competition. The fastest way to break cultural barriers.
Monthly
ZEN Talks
Mini TEDx evenings with ZSEM alumni, local professionals, and inspiring speakers.
Exam Periods
ZEN Mode
Free coffee, extended study hours, stress-relief corner, and full quiet zones.
Semester End
ZEN Fest
End-of-semester outdoor celebration. The event people post about forever.
Once / Semester
ZEN Pitch
Startup pitch night with ZSEM business network mentorship. Build while you study.
ZEN Café & Cantina

Where the day
begins.

The cantina is ZEN's living room — open from breakfast to late afternoon, and busiest in the soft hours between classes. Specialty coffee, fresh sandwiches, hand-stretched pizza, and a small daily menu that changes with the season.

It's where group projects come together over flat whites, where conversations stretch past the second espresso, and where the building's twenty nationalities slowly become familiar faces.

Specialty Coffee Fresh Sandwiches Pizza Daily Menu
Open daily · 07:30 – 18:00
Location & Access

Zagreb — compact,
walkable, alive.

Zagreb's compact city centre is a structural advantage. ZEN sits within 15 minutes' walk of ZSEM campus — unlike suburban European student housing models, you're part of the city from day one.

15'
Walk to ZSEM Campus
Or one direct tram connection. Always connected.
5'
To Supermarket & Pharmacy
Daily essentials within walking distance.
EU
Erasmus+ Partner
ZSEM is fully accredited. Seamless exchange experience.
2h
To the Adriatic Coast
Affordable, walkable, close to the sea and mountains.
The Residence
A new landmark
in Zagreb
Student Voices

What residents
actually say.

"I booked ZEN from Lisbon in 10 minutes. Virtual tour, all-inclusive pricing, English support — I knew exactly what I was getting. That peace of mind is worth everything."

MF
Mariana F.
Erasmus from Lisbon, Portugal

"ZEN In was the best decision I almost didn't make. I met my closest friends on that first evening. By day three I felt like I'd lived in Zagreb for months."

TK
Tobias K.
Exchange student from Munich, Germany

"Compared to private apartments, ZEN was the only option where I knew the price upfront. No surprise bills. No language barriers. Worth every euro."

AV
Ana V.
Domestic student from Split, Croatia
Book Your Place

Three steps.
Your room.
Done.

Book entirely online, entirely in English. Early-booking discount: €30–40 off the first month for bookings confirmed 3+ months in advance.

01
Select room & dates
Choose your room type and dates. Check real-time availability.
02
Complete your profile
Fill in personal details and university info. Under 5 minutes.
03
Pay deposit & confirm
Digital contract in English and Croatian within 48 hours.
Reserve Your Room

We respond within 24 hours. Full refund if cancelled 60+ days before start.
